description_long: This is a two-story detached house with a symmetrical front facade, featuring a central entryway flanked by windows and a covered porch supported by columns. The roof is a classic gable style with dormer windows, and the exterior is surrounded by a well-maintained yard enclosed by a low fence. The property includes a driveway with parked cars and a pathway leading to the main entrance. Mature trees and shrubs are distributed throughout the yard, providing shade and privacy. The house is set back from the street, with a sidewalk and road in front, and the rear of the property is bordered by additional greenery. The overall design suggests a traditional American suburban home, likely built with wood framing and finished with painted siding.
description: A traditional two-story house with a gable roof, central porch, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by a fenced yard with trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, driveway with cars, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, fenced yard, and landscaped garden area with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, more trees, and the back facade of the house with fewer windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side entrance, and additional yard space with trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with covered porch, columns, and steps leading to a prominent front door
